name: Raspberries with Peach Puree
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Raspberry vinegar, up to 3 tablespoons
2 tablespoons Sugar, powdered, or to taste
1/2 cup Creme fraiche, up to 3/4 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. To peel peaches, bring a medium saucepan of water to boil.
2. Drop 1 peach at a time gently into the boiling water.
3. Leave each peach for 5 seconds and retrieve it by piercing the flesh with a fork.
4. With a paring knife, slit the skin; it will slip off easily.
5. Puree the peaches in a food processor or a food mill fitted with the finest disk (about 1 cup puree).
6. Add the raspberry vinegar and enough powdered sugar to balance the taste.
7. Refrigerate until serving time.
8. Divide the puree among 4 dessert plates, spooning it into a semicircle.
9. Nestle a quarter of the raspberries beside each serving of puree.
10. Pass the creme fraiche separately.
